title: 一般现在时
content:
一般现在时表示经常发生的动作或客观真理。

结构：主语 + 动词原形/三单形式

标志词：always, usually, often, sometimes, every day

注意：主语是第三人称单数时动词加 -s 或 -es

examples.en: I go to school every day.
She likes reading books.

multipleChoice.sentence: She ___ to school every day.
multipleChoice.explanation: 主语是第三人称单数 She，动词用三单形式 goes

multipleChoice.sentence: They often ___ football after school.
multipleChoice.explanation: 主语 They 是复数，动词用原形 play

fillBlank.explanation: 主语是第三人称单数，cook 加 s
主语 We 是复数，动词用原形

passage.title: My Daily Routine
passage.text: I ___ (get) up at 6:30 every morning. Then I ___ (have) breakfast at 7:00. My father ___ (read) newspapers while eating. My mother ___ (cook) lunch for us. After that, I ___ (go) to school by bus. School ___ (start) at 8:30. I usually ___ (finish) my homework before dinner.
passage.explanation: 一般现在时描述日常习惯和规律动作

passage.title: Tom's Life
passage.text: Tom ___ (live) in Beijing. He ___ (study) at No.1 Middle School. Every day he ___ (take) the subway to school. He ___ (like) English very much. His teacher often ___ (praise) him. After school, Tom ___ (play) basketball with his friends.
passage.explanation: 一般现在时，注意第三人称单数动词加 s/es

title: 现在进行时
content:
现在进行时表示现在正在进行的动作。

结构：主语 + am/is/are + 动词-ing

标志词：now, at the moment, listen!, look!

examples.en: I am reading a book now.
Look! The boys are playing basketball.

multipleChoice.sentence: Listen! Someone ___ outside.
multipleChoice.explanation: Listen! 提示正在发生，用现在进行时

multipleChoice.sentence: The children ___ TV now.
multipleChoice.explanation: now 提示现在进行时

fillBlank.explanation: Look! 提示正在发生
今天正在穿

passage.title: At the Park
passage.text: Right now, I ___ (sit) on a bench. Some children ___ (play) soccer nearby. A girl ___ (run) after a ball. Two boys ___ (climb) the tree. Their mother ___ (call) them. A dog ___ (bark) loudly.
passage.explanation: 现在进行时 — 描述此刻正在发生的动作

title: 一般过去时
content:
一般过去时表示过去某个时间发生的动作或存在的状态。

结构：主语 + 动词过去式

标志词：yesterday, last night, ...ago, in 2020

examples.en: I visited my grandma yesterday.
She was late for school this morning.
examples.cn: 她今天早上上学迟到了。

multipleChoice.sentence: She ___ to Beijing last week.
multipleChoice.explanation: last week 是过去时间，go → went

multipleChoice.sentence: They ___ at home last night.
multipleChoice.explanation: last night 过去时间，主语 They 用 were

fillBlank.explanation: buy → bought 不规则变化

fillBlank.sentence: I ___ (see) her in the library just now.
fillBlank.explanation: just now 刚才，see → saw

passage.title: My Weekend
passage.text: Last weekend, I ___ (go) to the park with my family. We ___ (see) many beautiful flowers. My sister ___ (take) a lot of photos. My father ___ (buy) us ice cream. We ___ (sit) on the grass and ___ (have) a picnic. Later, we ___ (visit) my grandparents.
passage.explanation: 一般过去时，注意不规则动词的过去式

passage.title: Yesterday
passage.text: Yesterday, Tom ___ (wake) up at 7:00. He ___ (eat) a quick breakfast. Then he ___ (ride) his bike to school. In class, he ___ (answer) a difficult question. The teacher ___ (feel) very pleased. After school, Tom ___ (do) his homework carefully.
passage.explanation: 过去时，多个不规则动词

title: 一般将来时
content:
一般将来时表示将要发生的动作。

结构：主语 + will + 动词原形 / 主语 + am/is/are going to + 动词原形

标志词：tomorrow, next week, in the future

examples.en: I will go to Beijing tomorrow.
She is going to study hard next term.
examples.cn: 她下学期打算努力学习。

multipleChoice.sentence: They ___ a football match tomorrow.
multipleChoice.explanation: tomorrow 是将来时间，用 will have

multipleChoice.sentence: We ___ visit our grandparents next Sunday.
multipleChoice.explanation: next Sunday 用将来时

fillBlank.sentence: I ___ (call) you when I get home.
fillBlank.explanation: 将来的动作，用 will call

passage.title: My Summer Plan
passage.text: This summer, I ___ (visit) my grandparents. They ___ (be) very happy to see me. I ___ (stay) with them for two weeks. We ___ (go) fishing together. My grandpa ___ (teach) me how to swim. I think we ___ (have) a wonderful time.
passage.explanation: 一般将来时 will + 动词原形

passage.title: Next Week
passage.text: Next week, our class ___ (have) a sports meeting. Many students ___ (take) part in it. I ___ (run) in the 400-meter race. My friend ___ (jump) in the high jump. We ___ (practice) hard every day now. I believe we ___ (win) some prizes.
passage.explanation: 一般将来时和现在进行时的混合练习

title: 现在完成时
content:
现在完成时表示过去发生的动作对现在造成的影响，或从过去持续到现在的动作。

结构：主语 + have/has + 过去分词

标志词：already, yet, ever, never, just, since, for

examples.en: I have already finished my homework.
She has never been to Shanghai.

multipleChoice.sentence: I ___ already ___ my breakfast.
multipleChoice.explanation: 现在完成时，I 用 have eaten

multipleChoice.sentence: ___ you ever ___ a horse?
multipleChoice.explanation: ever 用于现在完成时

fillBlank.explanation: just 提示用现在完成时
since 2020 用现在完成时

passage.title: Changes in My Life
passage.text: I ___ (live) in this city since I was born. I ___ (be) to many places. I ___ already ___ (visit) the Great Wall twice. My English ___ (improve) a lot recently. I ___ (make) many new friends. But I ___ never ___ (travel) abroad.
passage.explanation: 现在完成时，含 have/has + 过去分词

title: 过去进行时
content:
过去进行时表示过去某个时刻正在进行的动作。

结构：主语 + was/were + 动词-ing

标志词：at 8:00 yesterday, while, when

examples.en: I was watching TV at 8:00 last night.
examples.cn: 昨晚八点我正在看电视。

examples.en: She was doing her homework when I called her.
examples.cn: 我给她打电话时她正在做作业。

multipleChoice.sentence: I ___ TV when she called.
multipleChoice.explanation: when 从句用过去时，主句用过去进行时

multipleChoice.sentence: While I ___ my homework, my mother came in.
multipleChoice.explanation: while 后接进行时

fillBlank.explanation: 昨晚 7 点正在吃饭

passage.title: A Stormy Night
passage.text: Last night at 8:00, I ___ (do) my homework. My mother ___ (cook) in the kitchen. My father ___ (read) a newspaper. Outside, the wind ___ (blow) hard. It ___ (rain) heavily. Some people ___ (run) home quickly.
passage.explanation: 过去进行时 — was/were + 动词ing，描述过去某时刻正在进行的动作

title: 被动语态-一般现在时
content:
被动语态表示主语是动作的承受者。

结构：主语 + am/is/are + 过去分词

examples.en: English is spoken in many countries.
The classroom is cleaned every day.

multipleChoice.sentence: Rice ___ in the south of China.
multipleChoice.explanation: 水稻被种植，is grown

multipleChoice.sentence: These computers ___ in China.
multipleChoice.explanation: 电脑被制造，are made

fillBlank.explanation: 房间被打扫，被动语态

passage.title: How Paper Is Made
passage.text: Paper ___ (make) from wood. First, trees ___ (cut) down. Then the wood ___ (take) to a factory. At the factory, the wood ___ (break) into small pieces. Water ___ (add) to make pulp. Finally, the pulp ___ (press) and dried to form paper.
passage.explanation: 被动语态现在时 — be + 过去分词，主语是动作承受者

title: 被动语态-一般过去时
content: 结构：主语 + was/were + 过去分词

examples.en: The bridge was built in 1990.
The window was broken by Tom.

multipleChoice.sentence: The Great Wall ___ built over 2000 years ago.
multipleChoice.explanation: was built

fillBlank.explanation: 过去时被动语态

passage.title: The Old Bridge
passage.text: The old bridge ___ (build) over 200 years ago. It ___ (design) by a famous architect. The stones ___ (carry) from a nearby mountain. The work ___ (finish) in only three years. The bridge ___ (use) by thousands of people every day. It was said that the bridge ___ (name) after a brave soldier.
passage.explanation: 被动语态过去时和现在时的混合练习

title: 名词基础
content:
名词表示人、事物、地点或抽象概念。

重点：可数名词及其单复数、不可数名词、专有名词、名词所有格。

可数名词复数变法：一般加 -s；s/x/ch/sh 结尾加 -es；辅音+y 变 y 为 i 加 -es；f/fe 结尾常变 ves；部分名词不规则变化，如 child→children。

examples.en: I have two apples.
There is some water in the cup.

multipleChoice.sentence: There are five ___ in the room.
multipleChoice.explanation: child 复数是不规则变化 children

multipleChoice.sentence: There are many ___ on the farm.
multipleChoice.explanation: sheep 单复数同形

fillBlank.sentence: There are three ___ (box) on the table.
fillBlank.explanation: box → boxes

passage.title: In the Classroom
passage.text: There are many ___ (student) in the classroom. On the desk, there are several ___ (pencil) and two ___ (eraser). Three ___ (child) are reading books. The teacher has many ___ (box) of chalk. There are five ___ (sheep) in the picture on the wall.
passage.explanation: 名词复数变化：一般加s，特殊变化 child→children, sheep→sheep

title: 形容词比较等级
content:
形容词有原级、比较级和最高级。比较两者时常用比较级，比较三者或以上时常用最高级。

变化规则：单音节词多加 -er/-est；以辅音字母+y 结尾通常变 y 为 i 加 -er/-est；多音节词多用 more/most；特殊变化如 good→better→best, bad→worse→worst。

examples.en: She is taller than me.
This book is more interesting than that one.

multipleChoice.sentence: This coat is ___ than that one.
multipleChoice.explanation: than 提示比较级

multipleChoice.sentence: She is the ___ student in our class.
multipleChoice.explanation: in our class 最高级用 best

fillBlank.sentence: This question is ___ (easy) than that one.
fillBlank.explanation: easy → easier

passage.title: Who Is the Best?
passage.text: Tom is ___ (tall) than Jack. But Jack is ___ (strong) than Tom. Among all of us, Mary is the ___ (smart) student. She works ___ (hard) than anyone else. This math problem is the ___ (difficult) of all. My bag is ___ (heavy) than yours.
passage.explanation: 比较级和最高级混合练习 — 单音节加er/est，多音节加more/most

title: 代词基础
content: 人称代词主格 I/you/he/she/it/we/they，宾格 me/you/him/her/it/us/them，物主代词 my/mine/your/yours 等

examples.en: I like her. She likes me.
This is my book. That is yours.

multipleChoice.sentence: ___ is my friend. ___ name is Lily.
multipleChoice.explanation: 主语用 She，名词前用 Her

multipleChoice.sentence: Is this ___ pen? Yes, it's ___.
multipleChoice.explanation: 名词前用 your，后面无名词用 mine

fillBlank.explanation: 介词后用宾格 him

passage.title: A Letter to a Friend
passage.text: ___ (我) want to tell you about ___ (我的) family. ___ (我们) live in a small town. ___ (我们的) house is near the river. ___ (你) should come to visit ___ (我们) someday. ___ (我) am sure ___ (你) will like it here.
passage.explanation: 人称代词主格、物主代词、宾格的综合练习

title: There be 句型
content:
表示"某处有某物"：There is/are + 名词 + 地点

就近原则：be 动词与最近的名词保持一致

examples.en: There is a cat under the table.
There are many students in the classroom.

multipleChoice.sentence: ___ a book on the desk.
multipleChoice.explanation: a book 是单数，用 There is

multipleChoice.sentence: There ___ a pen and two pencils in the box.
multipleChoice.explanation: 就近原则，a pen 是单数

fillBlank.sentence: ___ ___ many people in the park yesterday.
fillBlank.explanation: 过去时，people 复数用 There were

passage.title: My Neighborhood
passage.text: ___ (有) a big park near my home. ___ (有) many trees and flowers in it. ___ (有) also a small lake. ___ (有) some ducks on the lake. ___ (有) a bench under the big tree. ___ (有) many children playing every afternoon.
passage.explanation: There be 句型 — 就近原则，注意 There is/are 的选择

title: 宾语从句
content:
主句 + 连接词 + 从句（陈述语序）

连接词：that(陈述句)，if/whether(是否)，特殊疑问词

examples.en: I think (that) he is right.
Can you tell me where the station is?
examples.cn: 你能告诉我车站在哪里吗？

multipleChoice.sentence: I don't know ___ he will come.
multipleChoice.explanation: 是否来，用 if

multipleChoice.sentence: Can you tell me ___?
multipleChoice.explanation: 宾语从句用陈述语序

fillBlank.sentence: I wonder ___ she will come. (是否)
fillBlank.explanation: if 或 whether 表示"是否"

passage.title: What I Think
passage.text: I think ___ English is very useful. I don't know ___ I can pass the exam. My teacher often asks me ___ I have finished my homework. Can you tell me ___ the library is? I wonder ___ he will come tomorrow. I believe ___ hard work pays off.
passage.explanation: 宾语从句 — that, if/whether, 特殊疑问词的用法

title: 状语从句
content:
时间(when/while/before/after)，条件(if/unless)，原因(because/since)

主将从现：主句将来时，从句一般现在时

examples.en: If it rains, I will stay at home.
I was reading when she came in.

multipleChoice.sentence: If it ___ tomorrow, we won't go hiking.
multipleChoice.explanation: if 从句用一般现在时

multipleChoice.sentence: She didn't come to school ___ she was sick.
multipleChoice.explanation: because 表示原因

fillBlank.sentence: He will be happy if he ___ (get) a gift.
fillBlank.explanation: if 从句用一般现在时

passage.title: Planning a Trip
passage.text: If it ___ (not rain) tomorrow, we ___ (go) hiking. When we ___ (arrive) at the mountain, we ___ (start) climbing. I ___ (stay) home if I ___ (feel) sick. Unless you ___ (hurry) up, we ___ (miss) the bus.
passage.explanation: 状语从句 — 主将从现原则，if/when/unless 从句用一般现在时

title: 情态动词
content:
can/could(能)，must(必须)，may/might(可能)，should(应该)

情态动词后接动词原形

examples.en: I can swim.
You must finish your homework first.

multipleChoice.sentence: You ___ cross the street when the light is red.
multipleChoice.explanation: 红灯时禁止通行，mustn't

multipleChoice.sentence: ___ I borrow your pen?
multipleChoice.explanation: 请求许可用 May I

fillBlank.sentence: You ___ (应该) listen to the teacher.
fillBlank.explanation: 表示建议用 should

passage.title: School Rules
passage.text: Every student ___ (必须) wear school uniform. You ___ (不允许) eat in the classroom. You ___ (应该) hand in homework on time. You ___ (不能) use mobile phones in class. ___ I ___ (可以) borrow a pen? We ___ (必须) respect our teachers.
passage.explanation: 情态动词 — must(必须), should(应该), can/may(可以), mustn't(禁止)

title: 动词不定式
content:
to + 动词原形，可作宾语(want to do)、目的状语、宾语补足语等

It's + adj. + to do sth.

examples.en: I want to be a teacher.
It's important to learn English well.

multipleChoice.sentence: It's important ___ English well.
multipleChoice.explanation: It's + adj. + to do

multipleChoice.sentence: She wants ___ a doctor.
multipleChoice.explanation: want to do sth.

fillBlank.explanation: decide to do sth.

passage.title: My Dream
passage.text: I want ___ (become) a doctor when I grow up. It's important ___ (study) hard now. My parents encourage me ___ (follow) my dream. I plan ___ (go) to a good medical school. It's not easy ___ (achieve) this goal. I hope ___ (help) many people in the future.
passage.explanation: 动词不定式 to do — 作宾语(want to do)、目的、宾语补足语，It's + adj + to do

title: 过去将来时
content:
过去将来时表示从过去某个时间看将要发生的动作。

结构：主语 + would + 动词原形 / was/were going to + 动词原形

常用在宾语从句中，主句是过去时，从句表示将来。

examples.en: He said he would come the next day.
I knew she was going to be late.

multipleChoice.sentence: He told me he ___ help me.
multipleChoice.explanation: 主句是过去时，从句用过去将来时 would

multipleChoice.sentence: She said she ___ visit her grandma the next week.
multipleChoice.explanation: 过去将来时 was/were going to

fillBlank.sentence: I thought you ___ (come) to the party.
fillBlank.explanation: thought 是过去时，从句用 would come

passage.title: What He Promised
passage.text: Tom said he ___ (call) me later. He promised he ___ (finish) his homework before dinner. He told me he ___ (not be) late again. I believed he ___ (keep) his word.
passage.explanation: 过去将来时 — 过去说的将来动作，would + 动词原形

title: 过去完成时
content:
过去完成时表示在过去某个时间之前已经完成的动作。

结构：主语 + had + 过去分词

标志词：by the end of..., before, after, when

examples.en: I had finished my homework before dinner.
examples.cn: 我晚饭前已经完成了作业。

examples.en: She had left when I arrived.
examples.cn: 我到的时候她已经走了。

multipleChoice.sentence: By the time I got to the station, the train ___.
multipleChoice.explanation: got 是过去时，火车离开在之前，用过去完成时 had left

multipleChoice.sentence: She ___ never ___ such a beautiful place before.
multipleChoice.explanation: 由 before 可知用过去完成时 had seen

fillBlank.explanation: realized 是过去时，丢钥匙在之前，用 had lost

passage.title: A Surprising Day
passage.text: When I got home, I realized I ___ (forget) to lock the door. My mother ___ already ___ (cook) dinner. My brother ___ (finish) his homework before I arrived. I ___ never ___ (feel) so tired before.
passage.explanation: 过去完成时 — 过去的过去，had + 过去分词

title: 数词基础
content:
基数词 (one, two...) 表示数量；序数词 (first, second...) 表示顺序。

基数词特殊变法：13-19 加 -teen；20-90加 -ty；百 hundred，千 thousand
序数词：一般加 -th；特殊 first, second, third, fifth, eighth, ninth, twelfth

examples.en: There are forty students in our class.
He finished second in the race.
examples.cn: 他在比赛中获得第二名。

multipleChoice.sentence: There are ___ students in our class.
multipleChoice.explanation: 40 的正确拼写是 forty，注意没有 u

multipleChoice.sentence: My birthday is on the ___ of May.
multipleChoice.explanation: 第九是 ninth，nine去掉e加th

fillBlank.sentence: December is the ___ (12) month of the year.
fillBlank.explanation: 第十二是 twelfth，特殊变化

passage.title: My School
passage.text: There are ___ (55) students in our class. I sit in the ___ (3) row. The ___ (1) lesson is English. We have ___ (8) subjects this term. My classroom is on the ___ (4) floor.
passage.explanation: 基数词和序数词的综合练习

title: 冠词基础
content:
不定冠词 a/an 表泛指；定冠词 the 表特指。

a 用于辅音音素开头的词前，an 用于元音音素开头的词前。

the 用于：特指某人/物、第二次提到、独一无二的事物、序数词/最高级前。

examples.en: I have a book. The book is interesting.
examples.cn: 我有一本书。这本书很有趣。

examples.en: She is an honest girl.

multipleChoice.sentence: I have ___ useful book.
multipleChoice.explanation: useful 以辅音音素 /j/ 开头，用 a

multipleChoice.sentence: ___ sun rises in the east.
multipleChoice.explanation: 太阳是独一无二的，用 the

fillBlank.explanation: honest 以元音音素开头，用 an

passage.title: My Day
passage.text: I have ___ apple and ___ banana for breakfast. After breakfast, I go to ___ school by ___ bus. In the evening, I read ___ interesting book. ___ moon is very bright tonight.
passage.explanation: 冠词 a/an/the 的综合练习，注意零冠词的情况

title: 介词基础
content: 时间介词：at(时刻), on(某天), in(年月季节)；方位介词：in(在…里), on(在…上), under(在…下), behind(在…后), between(在…之间)；方式介词：by(乘/通过), with(用)

examples.en: I get up at 7:00 in the morning.
The book is on the desk.

multipleChoice.sentence: I often go to school ___ bus.
multipleChoice.explanation: by bus = 乘公交车，by + 交通工具

multipleChoice.sentence: The cat is ___ the table.
multipleChoice.explanation: 猫在桌子下面，用 under

fillBlank.explanation: 月份前用 in

passage.title: My Room
passage.text: There is a desk ___ (在…旁边) the window. The chair is ___ (在…前面) the desk. My bag is ___ (在…上) the chair. Some books are ___ (在…里) the desk drawer. I do my homework ___ (在) night.
passage.explanation: 方位介词和时间介词的综合练习

title: 定语从句
content:
定语从句修饰名词或代词。

关系代词：who(人/主语), whom(人/宾语), which(物), that(人/物)
关系副词：when(时间), where(地点), why(原因)

examples.en: The book that I bought is very interesting.
Do you know the girl who is singing?
examples.cn: 你认识那个正在唱歌的女孩吗？

multipleChoice.sentence: This is the book ___ I bought yesterday.
multipleChoice.explanation: book 是物，用 which/that

multipleChoice.sentence: The man ___ is wearing a hat is my uncle.
multipleChoice.explanation: man 是人，作主语用 who/that

fillBlank.sentence: This is the school ___ I studied three years ago. (在那里)
fillBlank.explanation: 地点用 where = in which

passage.title: My Friends
passage.text: The boy ___ (who/which) sits next to me is Tom. The girl ___ (who/which) you met yesterday is my sister. The book ___ (that/who) I borrowed from the library is very interesting. This is the reason ___ (why/which) I like English.
passage.explanation: 定语从句 — 选择正确的关系代词或关系副词

title: 感叹句
content:
What + (a/an) + 形容词 + 名词 + (主语+谓语)!
How + 形容词/副词 + (主语+谓语)!

What 后接名词，How 后接形容词或副词。

examples.en: What a beautiful flower it is!
How beautiful the flower is!

multipleChoice.sentence: ___ beautiful the girl is!
multipleChoice.explanation: beautiful 是形容词，用 How

multipleChoice.sentence: ___ wonderful movie it is!
multipleChoice.explanation: movie 是可数名词单数，用 What a

fillBlank.explanation: exciting 以元音开头，用 What an

passage.title: Expressing Feelings
passage.text: ___ (多么) a beautiful day! ___ (多么) blue the sky is! ___ (多么) fresh the air smells! ___ (多么) happy the children are! ___ (多么) a wonderful world!
passage.explanation: 感叹句 — What 接名词，How 接形容词/副词

title: 祈使句
content:
祈使句表示命令、请求或建议。

肯定：动词原形 + 其他
否定：Don't + 动词原形
Let's + 动词原形（表示建议）

examples.en: Open the door, please.
Don't be late.

multipleChoice.sentence: ___ in the library.
multipleChoice.explanation: 祈使句否定用 Don't + 动词原形

multipleChoice.sentence: ___ go to the park together!
multipleChoice.explanation: Let's + 动词原形表示建议

fillBlank.explanation: 祈使句肯定用动词原形

passage.title: Classroom Rules
passage.text: ___ (not run) in the hallway. ___ (keep) the classroom clean. ___ (not eat) in class. ___ (listen) to the teacher carefully. ___ (let's, be) quiet now.
passage.explanation: 祈使句 — 肯定用动词原形，否定用 Don't + 动词原形

title: 主谓一致
content:
谓语动词要和主语在人称和数上保持一致。

关键原则：语法一致(单复对应)、意义一致(集合名词)、就近一致(neither...nor..., either...or..., there be)

examples.en: Everyone in our class likes English.
examples.cn: 我们班每个人都喜欢英语。

examples.en: Neither he nor I am right.

multipleChoice.sentence: Each of the students ___ a new book.
multipleChoice.explanation: each 作主语，谓语用单数 has

multipleChoice.sentence: There ___ a pen and two books on the desk.
multipleChoice.explanation: There be 就近原则，a pen 是单数用 is

fillBlank.sentence: Neither Tom nor his friends ___ (like) math.
fillBlank.explanation: neither...nor 就近原则，friends 是复数用 like

passage.title: Our Class
passage.text: Everyone in our class ___ (be) friendly. Each of us ___ (have) a dream. The team ___ (be) practicing hard these days. Neither the students nor the teacher ___ (know) the answer yet.
passage.explanation: 主谓一致 — 不定代词单数、集合名词、就近原则

title: 动名词
content:
动名词由动词+ing构成，具有名词性质，可作主语、宾语、表语。

常见搭配：enjoy/finish/mind/practice/suggest doing sth.
介词后接动名词：be good at doing, be interested in doing, thank you for doing

examples.en: I enjoy reading books.
Thank you for helping me.

multipleChoice.sentence: I enjoy ___ to music.
multipleChoice.explanation: enjoy 后接动名词 listening

multipleChoice.sentence: He is good at ___ basketball.
multipleChoice.explanation: 介词 at 后接动名词 playing

fillBlank.explanation: mind 后接动名词 opening

passage.title: My Hobbies
passage.text: I enjoy ___ (read) books in my free time. I am interested in ___ (learn) English. My brother practices ___ (play) the piano every day. We look forward to ___ (visit) the museum.
passage.explanation: 动名词 — 动词/介词后接 doing

title: be 动词一般现在时
content: am/is/are 表示现在的身份、状态、位置或性质。I 用 am，第三人称单数用 is，you 和复数主语用 are。

examples.en: I am a student, and my brother is a teacher.
examples.cn: 我是一名学生，我哥哥是一名老师。

title: be 动词一般过去时
content: was/were 表示过去的身份、状态、位置或性质。I/he/she/it 用 was，you/we/they 和复数主语用 were。

examples.en: She was at home yesterday, but we were at school.
examples.cn: 她昨天在家，但我们在学校。

title: There be 的时态变化
content: There be 可随时间变化为 there is/are, there was/were, there will be 等；be 动词通常与后面最近的名词保持一致。

examples.en: There will be a meeting tomorrow.

title: 现在完成时 since / for
content: since 接时间点或从句，for 接一段时间；二者都常与现在完成时连用，表示动作或状态持续到现在。

examples.en: I have lived here for three years.
examples.cn: 我已经在这里住了三年。

title: have been to / have gone to / have been in
content: have been to 表示去过已回来；have gone to 表示去了未回来；have been in 表示待在某地一段时间。

examples.en: She has been to Shanghai twice.

title: 延续性动词与非延续性动词
content: 和 for/since 连用时通常使用延续性动词或状态表达，如 buy 需转换为 have，die 转换为 be dead。

examples.en: I have had this bike for two years.
examples.cn: 这辆自行车我已经买了两年。

title: 一般过去时动词变化
content: 规则动词一般加 -ed；以 e 结尾加 -d；辅音字母+y 变 y 为 i 加 -ed；部分动词为不规则变化。

examples.en: He played football after school yesterday.
examples.cn: 他昨天放学后踢了足球。

title: used to do
content: used to do 表示过去常常做某事而现在不一定如此，后接动词原形。

examples.en: My father used to walk to work.
examples.cn: 我爸爸过去常常步行去上班。

title: be going to 与 will 区分
content: be going to 常表示计划、打算或有迹象将要发生；will 常表示临时决定、预测或意愿。

examples.en: It is going to rain, so I will take an umbrella.
examples.cn: 快要下雨了，所以我会带一把伞。

title: 现在进行时表将来
content: go, come, leave, arrive, start 等表示位置移动或安排的动词，可用现在进行时表示较近的计划或安排。

examples.en: We are leaving for Beijing this evening.
examples.cn: 我们今晚要动身去北京。

title: 被动语态-一般将来时
content: 结构为 will be done 或 be going to be done，表示将来某事会被完成或处理。

examples.en: The classroom will be cleaned after school.
examples.cn: 教室将在放学后被打扫。

title: 被动语态-现在完成时
content: 结构为 have/has been done，表示动作已经被完成并对现在有影响。

examples.en: The work has been finished already.

title: 含情态动词的被动语态
content: 结构为 情态动词 + be + 过去分词，如 can be done, must be done, should be done。

examples.en: The homework must be handed in today.

title: 被动语态中的 by 短语
content: by 短语用于说明动作执行者；当执行者不明确或不重要时，by 短语常可省略。

examples.en: The story was written by a young writer.
examples.cn: 这个故事是一位年轻作家写的。

title: 主动语态与被动语态转换
content: 主动句宾语变被动句主语，谓语变为 be + 过去分词，主动句主语可放在 by 后。

examples.en: People use English widely. English is widely used.
examples.cn: 人们广泛使用英语。英语被广泛使用。

title: 感官/使役动词被动还原 to
content: make, see, hear, watch 等在主动语态中可接省略 to 的不定式，变被动时通常要还原 to。

examples.en: He was made to clean the room.

title: 可数名词与不可数名词
content: 可数名词有单复数形式，可直接与数词连用；不可数名词通常无复数形式，需借助量词表达数量。

examples.en: There are three apples and some water on the table.
examples.cn: 桌上有三个苹果和一些水。

title: 名词复数规则变化
content: 一般加 -s；以 s, x, ch, sh 结尾加 -es；辅音字母+y 变 y 为 i 加 -es；部分 f/fe 结尾变 ves。

examples.en: Boxes and buses usually add -es in the plural form.
examples.cn: box 和 bus 的复数通常加 -es。

title: 名词复数不规则变化
content: 常见不规则复数包括 child-children, man-men, woman-women, foot-feet, tooth-teeth, mouse-mice, sheep-sheep。

examples.en: There are two children and three sheep on the farm.
examples.cn: 农场里有两个孩子和三只羊。

title: 名词所有格
content: 名词所有格表示所属关系，常见形式有 Tom's, students', children's，也可用 of 表示所属。

examples.en: This is Tom's bag, and that is the teachers' office.
examples.cn: 这是汤姆的包，那是教师办公室。

title: 不可数名词数量表达
content: 不可数名词表达数量时常用 a piece of, a bottle of, a cup of, a pair of 等量词结构。

examples.en: I need two pieces of paper.

title: 人称代词主格/宾格
content: 主格作主语，如 I, he, she, we, they；宾格作宾语或介词宾语，如 me, him, her, us, them。

examples.en: He helps me with English.

title: 物主代词
content: 形容词性物主代词后接名词，如 my book；名词性物主代词相当于物主代词加名词，如 mine。

examples.en: This is my book. The blue one is mine.
examples.cn: 这是我的书。蓝色那本是我的。

title: 反身代词
content: 反身代词表示动作回到主语自身，如 myself, yourself, himself, herself, ourselves, themselves。

examples.en: The children enjoyed themselves at the party.
examples.cn: 孩子们在聚会上玩得很开心。

title: 指示代词
content: this/that 指单数或不可数，these/those 指复数；this/these 较近，that/those 较远。

examples.en: This is my pen, and those are her pencils.
examples.cn: 这是我的钢笔，那些是她的铅笔。

title: 不定代词
content: some, any, no, every 可与 body, one, thing 组合；不定代词作主语时谓语通常用单数。

examples.en: Everyone is ready for the test.
examples.cn: 每个人都准备好考试了。

title: one / it / that 的替代用法
content: it 指前文同一个事物；one 指同类中的一个；that 可替代前文提到的单数名词或不可数名词以避免重复。

examples.en: I lost my pen, so I need a new one.
examples.cn: 我丢了钢笔，所以需要一支新的。

title: both / either / neither / all / none
content: both 表两者都；either 表两者之一；neither 表两者都不；all 表三者或以上都；none 表三者或以上都不。

examples.en: Both Tom and Jack like music.
examples.cn: 汤姆和杰克都喜欢音乐。

title: 形容词作定语/表语
content: 形容词可放在名词前作定语，也可放在 be/look/sound/feel 等系动词后作表语。

examples.en: The soup smells delicious.

title: 副词的修饰功能
content: 副词可修饰动词、形容词、副词或整个句子，常表示方式、程度、频率、时间和地点。

examples.en: She speaks English clearly.

title: 副词比较级
content: 副词比较级用于比较两个动作或状态的程度，常与 than 连用。短副词常加 -er，如 fast→faster；以 -ly 结尾的副词多用 more，如 more carefully。

examples.en: This question is easier than that one.
examples.cn: 这个问题比那个问题容易。

title: 副词最高级
content: 副词最高级用于三者或以上动作程度的比较。短副词常加 -est，如 fastest；以 -ly 结尾的副词多用 most，如 most carefully。副词最高级前的 the 有时可省略。

examples.en: He is the tallest boy in our class.
examples.cn: 他是我们班最高的男孩。

title: 原级比较 as...as
content: as + 形容词/副词原级 + as 表示和……一样；not as/so...as 表示不如……。

examples.en: My room is as clean as yours.
examples.cn: 我的房间和你的一样干净。

title: -ed / -ing 形容词
content: -ed 形容词多描述人的感受，如 interested；-ing 形容词多描述事物特征，如 interesting。

examples.en: The news is exciting, and we are excited.
examples.cn: 这个消息令人兴奋，我们很激动。

title: 时间介词
content: at 用于具体时刻；on 用于具体某天；in 用于年、月、季节、上午下午晚上；since/for 常与完成时连用。

examples.en: We usually go to school at seven in the morning.
examples.cn: 我们通常早上七点去上学。

title: 地点方位介词
content: 常见地点方位介词包括 in, on, under, behind, between, among, across, through, beside, near 等。

examples.en: The cat is under the chair.

title: 方式介词
content: by 表方式或交通方式；with 表使用工具或伴随；in 可表示语言、颜色、方式等。

examples.en: He goes to school by bike.

title: 固定介词搭配
content: 常见搭配包括 be good at, be interested in, be proud of, be afraid of, be different from, look forward to。

examples.en: She is good at drawing.

title: 基数词
content: 基数词表示数量，如 one, two, three；hundred, thousand, million 与具体数字连用时通常不加 s。

examples.en: There are two hundred students in the hall.

title: 序数词
content: 序数词表示顺序，如 first, second, third；一般加 -th，注意 fifth, eighth, ninth, twelfth 等特殊形式。

examples.en: Today is my first day at this school.
examples.cn: 今天是我在这所学校的第一天。

title: 分数、小数、百分数
content: 分数通常分子用基数词、分母用序数词；百分数用 percent；小数按数字逐个读。

examples.en: Two thirds of the students like music.
examples.cn: 三分之二的学生喜欢音乐。

title: 年月日时间表达
content: 日期常用序数词表达；年份、月份、星期和具体时刻搭配不同介词；时间读法可用 past/to。

examples.en: The meeting is on June 1st at 9:00.
examples.cn: 会议在六月一日上午九点。

title: hundreds of 与 two hundred
content: 具体数字 + hundred/thousand/million 时不加 s；表示概数时用 hundreds of, thousands of。

examples.en: Hundreds of people visited the museum.

title: 不定冠词 a / an
content: a 用于辅音音素前，an 用于元音音素前；注意 useful 发 /j/ 用 a，hour/honest 元音开头用 an。

examples.en: She has an umbrella and a useful map.
examples.cn: 她有一把伞和一张有用的地图。

title: 定冠词 the
content: the 用于特指、再次提到、独一无二事物、序数词和最高级前，以及部分固定表达中。

examples.en: The sun rises in the east.

title: 零冠词
content: 三餐、球类、学科、交通方式 by bus、go to school 等表达中常不用冠词。

examples.en: We go to school by bus.
examples.cn: 我们乘公共汽车去上学。

title: 冠词固定搭配
content: 常见搭配包括 in the morning, at night, go to school, play the piano, play basketball 等。

examples.en: He plays basketball and plays the piano.

title: 陈述句
content: 陈述句用于说明事实、观点或状态，语序通常为主语在前、谓语在后。

examples.en: My sister likes reading.

title: 一般疑问句
content: 一般疑问句通常可用 yes/no 回答，常将 be 动词、助动词或情态动词提前。

examples.en: Do you often read English books?

title: 特殊疑问句
content: 特殊疑问句由 what, who, where, when, why, how 等疑问词引导，询问具体信息。

examples.en: Where does your uncle work?

title: 选择疑问句
content: 选择疑问句用 or 提供选择，回答时通常选择其中一项，不用 yes/no。

examples.en: Would you like tea or coffee?

title: 反意疑问句
content: 反意疑问句通常遵循前肯后否、前否后肯，并保持人称、时态和助动词一致。

examples.en: It is a nice day, isn't it?

title: 主语 + 谓语
content: 主语 + 不及物动词构成基本句型，如 Birds fly。

examples.en: Birds fly.

title: 主语 + 谓语 + 宾语
content: 主语 + 及物动词 + 宾语构成常见句型，如 I like English。

examples.en: I like English.

title: 主语 + 系动词 + 表语
content: 系动词如 be, look, sound, feel, become 后接表语说明主语状态或性质。

examples.en: The idea sounds great.

title: 主语 + 谓语 + 间接宾语 + 直接宾语
content: 双宾语结构中间接宾语多指人，直接宾语多指物，如 give me a book。

examples.en: My mother bought me a new coat.
examples.cn: 我妈妈给我买了一件新外套。

title: 主语 + 谓语 + 宾语 + 宾补
content: 宾语补足语补充说明宾语的状态、身份或动作，如 make me happy, ask him to go。

examples.en: We found the story interesting.
examples.cn: 我们觉得这个故事很有趣。

title: that 引导宾语从句
content: that 引导陈述意义的宾语从句，口语中常可省略，从句使用陈述语序。

examples.en: I think that he is right.

title: if / whether 引导宾语从句
content: if/whether 表示是否，引导一般疑问句意义的宾语从句，从句用陈述语序。

examples.en: I wonder whether he will come.

title: 疑问词引导宾语从句
content: what, where, when, why, how 等可引导特殊疑问句意义的宾语从句，从句用陈述语序。

examples.en: Can you tell me where the library is?
examples.cn: 你能告诉我图书馆在哪里吗？

title: 宾语从句陈述语序
content: 宾语从句中疑问词后不用疑问语序，应为主语 + 谓语，如 where he lives。

examples.en: I do not know what he wants.

title: 宾语从句时态一致
content: 主句为现在时，从句按实际情况使用时态；主句为过去时，从句通常使用相应过去时态。

examples.en: He said that he was busy.

title: 宾语从句否定转移
content: think, believe, suppose 等后接宾语从句时，否定常转移到主句，如 I don't think he is right。

examples.en: I don't think he will be late.

title: 时间状语从句
content: 由 when, while, before, after, until, as soon as 等引导，表示动作发生的时间关系。

examples.en: I will call you when I arrive.
examples.cn: 我到达时会给你打电话。

title: 条件状语从句
content: 由 if, unless 等引导，表示条件；常见考点是主将从现。

examples.en: If it rains tomorrow, we will stay at home.
examples.cn: 如果明天下雨，我们就待在家里。

title: 原因状语从句
content: 由 because, since, as 等引导，表示原因；because 不能与 so 连用。

examples.en: I stayed at home because I was ill.
examples.cn: 我待在家里，因为我病了。

title: 结果状语从句
content: 常由 so...that 或 such...that 引导，表示结果。

examples.en: He was so tired that he fell asleep quickly.
examples.cn: 他太累了，很快就睡着了。

title: 目的状语从句
content: 常由 so that, in order that 引导，表示目的，从句中常出现 can/could/may 等情态动词。

examples.en: Speak clearly so that everyone can hear you.
examples.cn: 说清楚些，以便每个人都能听见你。

title: 让步状语从句
content: 由 although, though, even though 等引导，表示让步；although/though 不与 but 连用。

examples.en: Although it was cold, we went out.
examples.cn: 虽然天气很冷，我们还是出去了。

title: 比较状语从句
content: 由 than, as...as 等引导，用于比较人、物或动作的程度。

examples.en: Tom runs faster than I do.

title: 主将从现
content: 在时间、条件状语从句中，主句用将来时，从句常用一般现在时表示将来。

examples.en: I will tell you as soon as he comes back.

title: who / that 指人
content: 先行词指人时，关系代词可用 who 或 that，在从句中可作主语或宾语。

examples.en: The boy who is singing is my cousin.
examples.cn: 正在唱歌的男孩是我的表弟。

title: which / that 指物
content: 先行词指物时，关系代词可用 which 或 that，在从句中可作主语或宾语。

examples.en: The book which you lent me is interesting.
examples.cn: 你借给我的那本书很有趣。

title: whose 表所属
content: whose 表示所属关系，后接名词，可指人也可指物。

examples.en: This is the girl whose mother is a doctor.
examples.cn: 这就是那个妈妈是医生的女孩。

title: where / when / why 引导定语从句
content: where 指地点，when 指时间，why 指原因；它们在从句中作状语。

examples.en: This is the village where I was born.

title: 关系代词作主语/宾语
content: 关系代词在定语从句中可作主语或宾语；作宾语时常可省略。

examples.en: The man who called you is my teacher.
examples.cn: 给你打电话的那个人是我的老师。

title: 只能用 that 的常见情况
content: 先行词被最高级、序数词、all, everything, nothing 等修饰或先行词既有人又有物时，常用 that。

examples.en: This is the best film that I have ever seen.
examples.cn: 这是我看过的最好的电影。

title: 单复数一致
content: 谓语动词要与主语在人称和数上保持一致，单数主语用单数谓语，复数主语用复数谓语。

examples.en: The boy likes apples, and the girls like pears.
examples.cn: 这个男孩喜欢苹果，女孩们喜欢梨。

title: 不定代词作主语
content: someone, everyone, anything, nothing 等不定代词作主语时，谓语通常用单数。

examples.en: Nothing is impossible if you try.
examples.cn: 只要你努力，没有什么是不可能的。

title: each / every / either / neither 作主语
content: each, every, either, neither 作主语时通常看作单数，谓语动词用单数。

examples.en: Each student has a dictionary.
examples.cn: 每个学生都有一本词典。

title: There be 就近原则
content: There be 句型中 be 动词通常与其后最近的名词保持数的一致。

examples.en: There is a pen and two books on the desk.
examples.cn: 桌上有一支钢笔和两本书。

title: either...or / neither...nor 就近原则
content: either...or, neither...nor, not only...but also 连接主语时，谓语常与最近的主语一致。

examples.en: Either you or he is right.

title: 集合名词作主语
content: family, team, class 等集合名词强调整体时谓语用单数，强调成员时可用复数。

examples.en: My family is a big one.
examples.cn: 我的家庭是一个大家庭。

title: 动词分类概览
content: 实义动词表示具体动作或状态；be 动词表示状态；助动词帮助构成疑问、否定、时态；情态动词表达能力、许可、义务或推测。

examples.en: Can you help me finish the work?
examples.cn: 你能帮我完成这项工作吗？

title: 动词三单
content: 一般现在时中，主语为第三人称单数时，实义动词通常加 -s 或 -es。

examples.en: She usually gets up early.

title: 动词过去式
content: 动词过去式用于一般过去时，分规则变化和不规则变化。

examples.en: They visited the museum yesterday.
examples.cn: 他们昨天参观了博物馆。

title: 动词过去分词
content: 过去分词用于完成时和被动语态，规则形式通常与过去式相同，不规则形式需单独记忆。

examples.en: The door is closed.

title: 动词 -ing 形式
content: 动词 -ing 形式用于进行时、动名词和现在分词，拼写变化包括去 e、双写尾字母等。

examples.en: He is playing football now.

title: can / could
content: can 表示能力、许可或可能；could 可表示过去能力，也可用于更委婉的请求。

examples.en: I can swim, but I could not swim last year.
examples.cn: 我会游泳，但去年我不会。

title: may / might
content: may 表示许可或可能；might 语气更不确定，也可用于委婉表达。

examples.en: You may leave now.

title: must / have to
content: must 强调主观看法上的必须；have to 强调客观条件导致的不得不。

examples.en: I must finish my homework, but I have to clean my room first.
examples.cn: 我必须完成作业，但我得先打扫房间。

title: should / ought to
content: should 和 ought to 表示建议、责任或应该做某事，后接动词原形。

examples.en: You should drink more water.

title: need
content: need 可作情态动词或实义动词；作情态动词时多用于否定句和疑问句。

examples.en: You needn't worry about it.

title: had better
content: had better do sth. 表示最好做某事，否定形式为 had better not do sth.。

examples.en: You had better go home early.

title: mustn't / needn't / don't have to
content: mustn't 表示禁止；needn't 和 don't have to 表示不必。

examples.en: You mustn't run in the classroom.

title: 情态动词表推测
content: must 表示有把握的肯定推测；may/might 表示可能；can't 表示有把握的否定推测。

examples.en: The light is on, so he must be at home.
examples.cn: 灯亮着，所以他一定在家。

title: want / decide / hope / plan to do
content: want, decide, hope, plan 等动词后常接动词不定式作宾语。

examples.en: I hope to see you again.

title: ask / tell / want sb. to do
content: ask, tell, want, encourage 等动词后可接 sb. to do sth. 作宾语补足语。

examples.en: The teacher asked us to read aloud.

title: It is + adj. + to do
content: It is + 形容词 + to do sth. 中 it 作形式主语，真正主语是不定式。

examples.en: It is important to learn English well.

title: 疑问词 + to do
content: what/how/where/when + to do 可作宾语，表示做什么、怎样做、去哪里做等。

examples.en: I do not know how to solve the problem.
examples.cn: 我不知道怎样解决这个问题。

title: enjoy / finish / mind / practice doing
content: enjoy, finish, mind, practice, suggest 等动词后常接动名词。

examples.en: She enjoys listening to music.

title: 介词后接 doing
content: 介词后接动词时通常用动名词，如 be good at doing, look forward to doing。

examples.en: He is interested in playing chess.

title: stop to do / stop doing
content: stop to do 表示停下来去做另一件事；stop doing 表示停止正在做的事。

examples.en: Let's stop to have a rest.
examples.cn: 我们停下来休息一下吧。

title: remember to do / remember doing
content: remember to do 表示记得去做未做的事；remember doing 表示记得做过的事。

examples.en: Remember to close the window.

title: forget to do / forget doing
content: forget to do 表示忘记去做未做的事；forget doing 表示忘记做过的事。

examples.en: I forgot to bring my notebook.

title: make / let / have sb. do
content: make, let, have 作使役动词时可接 sb. do sth.，不定式符号 to 常省略。

examples.en: The joke made us laugh.

title: see / hear / watch sb. do / doing
content: see/hear/watch sb. do 表示看到/听到全过程；see/hear/watch sb. doing 表示看到/听到正在进行。

examples.en: I saw him crossing the street.

title: and / but / or / so
content: and 表并列或顺承；but 表转折；or 表选择或否则；so 表结果。

examples.en: I wanted to go out, but it began to rain.
examples.cn: 我想出去，但是开始下雨了。

title: both...and
content: both...and 连接两个并列成分，表示两者都；连接主语时谓语通常用复数。

examples.en: Both my sister and I like English.
examples.cn: 我姐姐和我都喜欢英语。

title: either...or
content: either...or 表示两者之一；连接主语时谓语常遵循就近原则。

examples.en: Either Tom or Jack will help you.

title: neither...nor
content: neither...nor 表示两者都不；连接主语时谓语常遵循就近原则。

examples.en: Neither he nor I am afraid of the test.

title: not only...but also
content: not only...but also 表示不但……而且……；连接主语时谓语常遵循就近原则。

examples.en: Not only you but also he likes the song.
examples.cn: 不仅你喜欢这首歌，他也喜欢。

title: because / because of
content: because 后接句子；because of 后接名词、代词或动名词短语。

examples.en: He was late because of the heavy rain.

title: although / though 与 but 不连用
content: although/though 引导让步状语从句时，英语中通常不再与 but 连用。

examples.en: Although he is young, he works hard.
examples.cn: 虽然他年轻，但他学习很努力。

title: so 与 because 不连用
content: because 引导原因，so 引出结果；英语中一般不把 because 和 so 在同一句中配对使用。

examples.en: Because he was ill, he stayed at home.
examples.cn: 因为他生病了，所以他待在家里。

title: if / whether 区分
content: if 和 whether 都可表示是否；whether 可与 or not 连用，介词后通常用 whether。

examples.en: I am not sure whether he will agree or not.
examples.cn: 我不确定他是否会同意。

title: unless
content: unless 表示除非，相当于 if...not，引导条件状语从句。

examples.en: You will miss the bus unless you hurry.
examples.cn: 除非你快点，否则会错过公交车。

title: too...to
content: too + 形容词/副词 + to do 表示太……而不能做某事。

examples.en: The box is too heavy to carry.

title: so...that
content: so + 形容词/副词 + that 从句，表示如此……以至于……。

examples.en: He ran so fast that we could not catch him.
examples.cn: 他跑得太快了，我们追不上他。

title: such...that
content: such + 名词短语 + that 从句，表示如此……以至于……。

examples.en: It was such a good film that we watched it twice.
examples.cn: 这是一部如此好的电影，我们看了两遍。

title: enough to
content: 形容词/副词 + enough + to do 表示足够……可以做某事。

examples.en: She is old enough to go to school.
examples.cn: 她年龄够大，可以上学了。

title: It's time to do / for sth.
content: It's time to do sth. 或 It's time for sth. 表示该做某事了。

examples.en: It's time to have lunch.

title: It takes sb. time to do
content: It takes sb. some time to do sth. 表示某人花费多少时间做某事。

examples.en: It takes me twenty minutes to walk to school.
examples.cn: 我步行到学校要花二十分钟。

title: spend / pay / cost / take
content: spend 常以人作主语；pay 表付款；cost 常以物作主语；take 常用于 It takes sb. time to do。

examples.en: I spent ten yuan on the book.

title: prefer A to B / prefer to do
content: prefer A to B 表示比起 B 更喜欢 A；prefer to do 表示更愿意做某事。

examples.en: I prefer tea to coffee.

title: would like to do
content: would like to do sth. 表示想要做某事，语气比 want 更委婉。

examples.en: I would like to join the English club.

title: Why not do / Why don't you do
content: Why not do sth.? 和 Why don't you do sth.? 用于提出建议。

examples.en: Why not ask your teacher for help?
examples.cn: 为什么不向老师求助呢？

title: had better do
content: had better do sth. 表示最好做某事；否定形式为 had better not do sth.。

examples.en: You had better not stay up late.

title: be used to doing
content: be used to doing sth. 表示习惯于做某事，其中 to 是介词。

examples.en: I am used to getting up early.

title: be used to do
content: be used to do sth. 表示被用来做某事，是被动结构。

examples.en: Wood is used to make paper.

title: so do I / neither do I
content: so + 助动词/be/情态动词 + 主语 表示某人也如此；neither/nor 表示某人也不。

examples.en: I like English. So do I.

title: Here / There 倒装
content: Here/There 位于句首且主语为名词时，常用倒装语序，如 Here comes the bus。

examples.en: Here comes the bus.

title: the 比较级, the 比较级
content: the + 比较级..., the + 比较级... 表示越……就越……。

examples.en: The harder you work, the better you will become.
examples.cn: 你越努力，就会变得越好。

title: 专有名词
content: 专有名词表示特定的人名、地名、机构名、节日或作品名等，首字母通常大写，如 China, Beijing, Tom, Christmas。专有名词前是否用冠词要看固定表达和具体语境。

examples.en: Tom lives in Beijing, China.

title: 动词的基本形式
content: 动词常见基本形式包括原形、第三人称单数、过去式、过去分词和 -ing 形式。它们分别服务于一般现在时、过去时、完成时、被动语态、进行时和非谓语结构。

examples.en: write, writes, wrote, written and writing are different forms of the verb write.
examples.cn: write、writes、wrote、written 和 writing 是动词 write 的不同形式。

title: 及物动词和不及物动词
content: 及物动词后通常直接接宾语，如 visit a museum；不及物动词后不直接接宾语，如 arrive late。部分动词既可及物也可不及物，需结合句子判断。

examples.en: We visited the museum yesterday, and we arrived early.
examples.cn: 我们昨天参观了博物馆，并且到得很早。

title: 系动词
content: 系动词连接主语和表语，说明主语的身份、状态或性质。常见系动词有 be, look, sound, feel, smell, taste, become, get, turn 等。

examples.en: The soup smells delicious.

title: 助动词
content: 助动词帮助构成否定、疑问、时态、完成体或被动语态，本身通常不单独表达完整词义。常见助动词包括 be, do, have。

examples.en: Do you like English? She has finished her homework.
examples.cn: 你喜欢英语吗？她已经完成了作业。

title: 形容词的基本形式
content: 形容词基本形式用于直接描述名词或主语性质，可作定语或表语。作定语时常放在名词前，作表语时常放在系动词后。

examples.en: She is a careful student, and she is kind.
examples.cn: 她是一个细心的学生，而且她很友善。

title: 常见形容词词尾/词缀
content:
常见形容词词尾包括 -ful, -less, -ous, -al, -able, -ible, -ive, -y, -ed, -ing 等，如 helpful, careless, famous, natural, comfortable, active, rainy, interested, interesting。前缀 un-, im-, in-, dis- 常构成反义词，如 unhappy, impossible, incorrect, dishonest。

-ed 形容词多描述人的感受，如 interested, excited, bored；-ing 形容词多描述事物特征或带来的感觉，如 interesting, exciting, boring。

examples.en: A helpful person is not always a careless person.
examples.cn: 乐于助人的人并不总是粗心的人。

examples.en: The story is interesting, and the students are interested in it.
examples.cn: 这个故事很有趣，学生们对它感兴趣。

multipleChoice.sentence: Which word is usually an adjective?
multipleChoice.explanation: -ful 常构成形容词，careful 意为“仔细的”。

multipleChoice.sentence: The film is very ___. I am ___ in it.
multipleChoice.explanation: -ing 形容词多描述事物特征，-ed 形容词多描述人的感受。

fillBlank.explanation: un- 常构成反义词，表示“不、非”。

title: 常见副词词尾/词缀
content: 许多方式副词由形容词加 -ly 构成，如 quick→quickly, careful→carefully。以辅音字母+y 结尾常变 y 为 i 再加 -ly，如 happy→happily。注意 friendly, lovely 等虽然以 -ly 结尾，但通常是形容词。

examples.en: She answered the question carefully and happily.
examples.cn: 她认真又开心地回答了问题。

multipleChoice.sentence: Which word is usually an adverb?
multipleChoice.explanation: quickly 是由 quick 加 -ly 构成的方式副词；friendly 和 lovely 通常是形容词。

fillBlank.sentence: happy becomes ___ when it is used as an adverb.
fillBlank.explanation: 辅音字母+y 结尾的形容词变副词时，常变 y 为 i 再加 -ly。
